label: Mixed-SKU e-commerce · GMA · 6-axis
description: 3 SKUs random sequence; 9m × 7m cell; GMA pallets; 6-axis required for repacking; $220k budget.
prompt: Mixed case palletizing for an e-commerce warehouse. Three SKUs through one line in random sequence: 350x250x180 mm 8 kg, 500x400x300 mm 18 kg, 600x400x250 mm 22 kg. Throughput target 700 cph combined. Cell envelope 9 m by 7 m. GMA pallets (48 x 40 inches). The robot needs to repack cases — orientation is not preserved on the infeed, so we need a 6-axis arm. Budget ceiling 220k USD bare arm. Operating 16 hours per day across two shifts.

constraints.description: Robot must reach the pallet's far corner with 6-axis EOAT for repacking.

assumptions: Largest SKU (600x400x300 mm, 22 kg) used as the dimensional design driver.
GMA standard inferred from imperial 48x40 in -> 1219x1016 mm.
spec.notes: 3 SKUs random sequence; uses largest case as design driver.
